headline: Assessing Devon Energy (DVN) Valuation After Strong Recent Shareholder Returns
summary: Event context and recent share performance Devon Energy (DVN) has drawn attention after recent trading left the stock near US$47.22, with the price up about 8% over the past 3 months but down slightly over the past month. See our latest analysis for Devon Energy. At around US$47.22, Devon Energy’s share price has a year to date share price return of 24.69%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 55.47% points to momentum that has built over a longer period.
